fields.name: Indent
fields.tooltip: Specifies the relationship of the workflow step under parent workflow steps.

fields.name: Event Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the workflow event that triggers the related workflow response.

fields.name: Condition
fields.tooltip: Specifies the condition that moderates the workflow event that you specified in the Event Description field. When you choose the field, the Event Conditions window opens in which you can specify condition values for predefined lists of relevant fields.

fields.name: Entry Point
fields.tooltip: Specifies the workflow step that starts the workflow. The first workflow step is always of type Entry Point.

fields.name: Next Step Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies another workflow step than the next one in the sequence that you want to start, for example, because the event on the workflow step failed to meet a condition.
